RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: PLAINTIFFS CHARLES LEE and ALEXANDRA BOYLE'S Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint is granted as to the prayer for relief for punitive damages and denied for a $ 500 penalty for each and every violation of Business & Professions Code section 7160. For punitive damages, prejudice will not result from amendment. Plaintiff originally asserted a fraud claim upon which punitive damages may be sought. For Business & Professions Code section 7160, the plain language of 7160 refers to a single penalty of $ 500 for multiple misrepresentations and statements made to induce a party to contract for a work of improvement.
